title: `showSaveFilePicker()` DIalog can Overlaid on Other Origin lead to Origin Spoofing
bounty_rationale: report of lower impact security UI issue

attachments.filename: showsavefilepicker can overlaid on other origin.mov

description_snippet:
# Steps to reproduce the problem
1. Access poc.html
2. Click anywhere at the poc.html
3. Browse any sites and after 3sec the dialog will appear on other origin

# Problem Description
This vulnerability occurs when the showSaveFilePicker() dialog can be overlaid on another origin . By default, if a p
